titleStmt.title: SII 28.299: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 299. (A.R. No. 453 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, Kamalamaṅgai shrine, north, wall.
The beginning portion of the line of this inscription is erased and damaged.

It records a royal order addressed to the tānattār of the temple of Vayirāvaṇa-Īśvaram uḍaiya-nāyaṉār intimating the grant of 1000 kuḻi out of the vāra-ppaṟṟu lands under the irrigation of the big reservoir of Toḻuvūr in Magadamaṇḍalam, as dēvadāna-iṟai-ili (tax-free on account of the land being granted to the temple) including the cash levies (kāśāyam) and poṉvari and all other levies (āyam) for the worship and repairs to the temple of a God (name erased).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya devaṟkku yāṇṭu patineṭṭāvatu Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār vayirāvaṇaīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tānattāṟku makatamaṇṭalattu toḻuvūr periya Eri vārappaṟṟu
naṉcey nilattu va �ṉa ta ṉṉāyaṉār pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Āyiram kuḻi poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa kācāya vaṟkamum Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākat taṉtom
Innilam Araiyum ta til ta kaikoṇṭu Iṉta nāḷ mutal cantirātittavarai celvatāka nāṉkellaiyum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka
I[vai vāṇa ṉ] Eḻuttu Ivai tiruveḻuttu tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
